metadata.title: Sneaking Through B Site with Clean Shots and Smart Positioning in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a quick B site push where smooth movement and precise aim make all the difference. Timing those peeks just right helped secure the round.
What’s your favorite site to take in VALORANT? Share your thoughts below!

Drop your favorite clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #clutch
